title: Supply Chain Manager - MSC India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - MSC India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the MSC India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MSC India:
MSC India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MSC India!
